name: SomeIpProvidedEventsAndFieldsAddConsumer
title: SomeIpProvidedEventsAndFieldsAddConsumer
syntax: long SomeIpProvidedEventsAndFieldsAddConsumer(dword psiHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort);
description: Adds a consumer to a provided service instance. Afterwards all event/field notifications belonging to this service instance will be sent to this consumer.

parameters.name: psiHandle
parameters.description: Provided service instance handle (may be retrieved by SomeIpGetProvidedObjectHandle)
